# llms.txt — InvestBrain

## Project Overview

InvestBrain is a self-discipline tool for experienced investors. It acts as a "mirror + discipline anchor" — NOT a financial advisor. The product helps investors resist narrative-driven decisions through structured idea logging, RAG-based knowledge retrieval, behavior pattern mining, and rule-based reminders.

Mission: 解决"知行合一"问题 (Bridge the gap between knowing and doing).

## Core Pages

- [README](https://github.com/lj22503/invest-brain) — Full documentation (Chinese)
- [README_EN](https://github.com/lj22503/invest-brain/blob/main/README_EN.md) — English documentation
- [Homepage](https://invest-brain-mocha.vercel.app) — Live demo

## What it is

**One-liner**: A "mirror + discipline anchor" that audits investor behavior and flags biases — not investment advice.

**Core value**:
- **想法记录** (Idea capture): User speaks, AI parses + links history + generates cards
- **投资 RAG** (RAG over masters): GraphRAG + vector retrieval over Buffett / Munger / Dalio / Soros
- **记忆系统** (Memory): User profile, decision history, behavior pattern mining
- **提醒触发** (Triggers): Price / time / condition monitoring, 飞书 push support
- **行为模式挖掘** (Behavior mining): Auto-detect loss aversion / herding / overconfidence

**Target users**: 有经验的老客户 (Experienced investors who need discipline anchors and behavior audits)

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Tech |
|---|---|
| LLM | DeepSeek API |
| RAG | GraphRAG + 向量检索 |
| Protocol | MCP Server (Model Context Protocol) |
| Backend | Python + FastAPI |
| Notifications | 飞书 (Feishu) push |
| Deploy | Vercel |

## Installation

```bash
# 1. Install deps
cd src/mcp_server
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 2. Configure env
cp .env.example .env
# Fill in DEEPSEEK_API_KEY

# 3. Start REST API (LLM config)
python api_server.py

# 4. Start MCP Server (separate terminal)
python server.py
```

## Core Capabilities

| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| 想法记录 | User says something, AI parses + links history + generates cards |
| 投资 RAG | Big-master thought retrieval Q&A (GraphRAG + vector) |
| 记忆系统 | User profile, decision history, behavior pattern mining |
| 提醒触发 | Price/time/condition monitoring with 飞书 push |
| 行为模式挖掘 | Auto-discover investor bias patterns |

## 11 Recommended Topics

```
ai-agent, ai-investing, claude-desktop, deepseek, investment,
investment-rules, mcp-server, personal-knowledge-base, python,
quantitative-analysis, self-discipline
```

## Quality Standards

- NOT investment advice (产品定位)
- Behavior audit focus
- RAG-grounded answers (no hallucination)
- Local data only (no cloud storage)

## Search Keywords

investment discipline, self-discipline tool, behavior pattern mining, RAG, MCP server, 行为模式挖掘, 知行合一, 投资纪律, GraphRAG, bias detection, 飞书 push, DeepSeek, Python investment tool.
